title: Dock Sprint
subtitle: Time Attack / Shadow Moses entry route
objective: Reach the extraction marker as fast as possible while keeping combat noise low.
briefing: A compact VR version of Mission 001. Route memory matters more than firepower.

rewards.description: Unlocks a route-memory tape when you clear with FOX rank or better.

title: Ghost Dock
subtitle: No Alert infiltration drill
objective: Complete the route with zero full alerts and no lethal takedowns.
briefing: This drill rewards patience: slow movement, crouch timing, and clean line-of-sight breaks.

rewards.description: Unlocks a no-alert after-action tape when you reach FOXHOUND or better.

title: SOCOM Range
subtitle: Weapon training / accuracy evaluation
objective: Neutralize target drones with controlled fire and avoid wasting ammunition.
briefing: Suppressed fire is not magic. Every shot should have a purpose.
restrictions: CQC does not count toward weapon objective

rewards.description: Unlocks a weapon discipline tape when the result reaches FOX rank or better.

title: Quiet CQC
subtitle: Non-lethal close quarters drill
objective: Clear the corridor using non-lethal takedowns and minimal gunfire.
briefing: CQC is useful when distance collapses, but it is risky if another guard has sightline.

rewards.description: Adds a local VR badge for clean non-lethal doctrine.

title: Chaff Breaker
subtitle: Camera and searchlight disruption drill
objective: Disable surveillance windows with chaff and cross the yard without full compromise.
briefing: Electronics can be disrupted, not defeated forever. Timing matters.

rewards.description: Adds a local VR badge for surveillance disruption.

title: Armored Captain Duel
subtitle: Boss challenge / shield pressure test
objective: Defeat the Armored Guard Captain with limited damage and disciplined fire.
briefing: A boss drill built from Mission 001. Read the pattern, preserve distance, and do not panic-fire.

rewards.description: Unlocks the boss duel replay tape when you reach FOX rank or better.

title: FAMAS Moving Line
subtitle: Weapon Mode / MOVE-B tracking drill
objective: Destroy all eight MOVE-B targets while controlling automatic fire.
briefing: MOVE-B targets stay mobile. Lead each target and use short FAMAS bursts instead of emptying the magazine.

rewards.description: Recognizes disciplined burst control against moving VR targets.

title: PSG1 Precision Grid
subtitle: Weapon Mode / long-range CUBE-B drill
objective: Destroy six distant CUBE-B targets with minimal PSG1 ammunition.
briefing: CUBE-B targets remain fixed, making this a pure test of sight alignment, timing and shot economy.

rewards.description: Recognizes economical long-range fire against fixed VR targets.

title: CUBE-R Chain
subtitle: Weapon Mode / grenade blast drill
objective: Clear six explosive CUBE-R targets with controlled grenade chain reactions.
briefing: CUBE-R targets can trigger nearby red targets. Maintain blast distance and choose the first detonation carefully.

rewards.description: Recognizes safe use of explosive target chain reactions.

title: C4 Wall Breach
subtitle: Weapon Mode / destructible WALL drill
objective: Plant C4 and destroy five WALL obstructions to open the goal route.
briefing: WALL targets are destructible obstacles. Place each charge, withdraw beyond the blast and detonate deliberately.

rewards.description: Recognizes clean C4 placement against destructible VR walls.

title: KOKESHI-B Mine Lane
subtitle: Weapon Mode / Claymore interception drill
objective: Use Claymores to intercept six moving KOKESHI-B targets.
briefing: KOKESHI-B is the dedicated Claymore-training target. Read its route before committing each directional mine.

rewards.description: Recognizes correct Claymore placement against KOKESHI-B targets.

title: Stinger UFO Hunt
subtitle: Weapon Mode / airborne explosive target drill
objective: Acquire clean Stinger locks and destroy four moving UFO targets.
briefing: UFO is a large moving explosive target designed for Stinger practice. Keep clear of overlapping blast zones.

rewards.description: Recognizes efficient Stinger locks against airborne VR targets.

title: Nikita Red Route
subtitle: Weapon Mode / guided MOVE-R drill
objective: Guide Nikita missiles through the route and destroy six explosive MOVE-R targets.
briefing: MOVE-R targets move and detonate. Steer around cover, break the correct cluster and keep Snake outside the blast.

rewards.description: Recognizes controlled Nikita routing against MOVE-R targets.

title: KOKESHI-G Unarmed
subtitle: Special Mode / bare-handed moving-target drill
objective: Neutralize six moving KOKESHI-G targets using bare-handed combat only.
briefing: KOKESHI-G is reserved for unarmed training. Close distance, commit to each strike and do not fire.

rewards.description: Recognizes a clean bare-handed KOKESHI-G clear.

title: Ninja Level 01: Pole Cut
subtitle: Special Mode / Ninja Level 01
objective: Control Gray Fox and slice all 15 poles with the high-frequency blade.
briefing: The first official Ninja stage places poles across the arena and on top of crates while Genome Soldiers patrol nearby.

rewards.description: Recognizes a fast clear of all 15 Ninja Level 01 poles.

title: Ninja Level 02: Guard Sweep
subtitle: Special Mode / Ninja Level 02
objective: Eliminate all 30 Genome Soldiers with Gray Fox's blade.
briefing: The second official Ninja stage is an arena sweep. Search every section or deliberately draw the remaining patrols out of hiding.

rewards.description: Recognizes elimination of all 30 soldiers in Ninja Level 02.

title: Ninja Level 03: Snake Hunt
subtitle: Special Mode / Ninja Level 03
objective: Find Solid Snake in a Genome Soldier uniform and strike only him without being detected.
briefing: Snake's face is the only reliable tell. Detection or attacking the wrong soldier immediately fails this official Ninja finale.
restrictions: Solid Snake is disguised as a guard

rewards.description: Recognizes a clean assassination of the disguised Solid Snake.

title: Mystery 01: Broken Camera
subtitle: Special Mode / Mystery Level 01
objective: Inspect the broken camera, identify the marked suspect, and escort him to the goal.
briefing: A tall-mounted camera has been knocked down. The culprit's build and fresh head bruise reveal who collided with it.

rewards.description: Recognizes the correct camera-collision deduction and escort.

title: Mystery 02: Socks
subtitle: Special Mode / Mystery Level 02
objective: Match the abandoned pink sock to its mate, then arrest and escort the culprit.
briefing: Someone took the criminal's mask. One suspect is now wearing the matching sock on his head.

rewards.description: Recognizes the correct matching-sock deduction and escort.

title: Mystery 03: Popsicle
subtitle: Special Mode / Mystery Level 03
objective: Use the blue popsicle and cold-breath tell to identify and escort the culprit.
briefing: Inspect all three suspects in the cold room. The man who ate the frozen treat reacts differently from the others.

rewards.description: Recognizes the correct cold-breath deduction and escort.

title: Mystery 04: Nearsighted
subtitle: Special Mode / Mystery Level 04
objective: Test the suspects near the wall, then arrest and escort the nearsighted culprit.
briefing: The owner of the lost spectacles is unable to judge the wall correctly after being repositioned.

rewards.description: Recognizes the correct eyesight test and escort.

title: Mystery 05: The Gateway
subtitle: Special Mode / Mystery Level 05
objective: Track the fleeing suspect through the position swap, arrest him, and escort him to the goal.
briefing: The criminal runs before Snake enters and crosses another man at the gateway. Do not lose the original target.

rewards.description: Recognizes uninterrupted tracking through the suspect swap.

title: Mystery 06: The Dying Message
subtitle: Special Mode / Mystery Level 06
objective: Interpret the Johnny clue, compare fall reactions, and escort the identified culprit.
briefing: Apply the same punch-punch-kick test to each suspect. Johnny's fall pattern differs from the other guards.
restrictions: Use the same combo on each suspect

rewards.description: Recognizes the correct Johnny reaction test and escort.

title: Mystery 07: Footprints
subtitle: Special Mode / Mystery Level 07
objective: Crawl along the correct footprint trail, arrest the suspect it reaches, and escort him.
briefing: Three trails cross the snow. Crawling prevents Snake's own footprints from obscuring the evidence.

rewards.description: Recognizes a clean footprint trace without contaminating the evidence.

title: Mystery 08: A Feeble Man
subtitle: Special Mode / Mystery Level 08
objective: Compare the suspects' heartbeats, arrest the nervous culprit, and escort him to the goal.
briefing: The guilty man is jittery. Inspection reveals one heartbeat running much faster than the others.

rewards.description: Recognizes the correct heartbeat deduction and escort.

title: Mystery 09: Disguise
subtitle: Special Mode / Mystery Level 09
objective: Equip the blond wig, expose the suspect who salutes fake Liquid, and escort him.
briefing: The culprit's eyesight is poor enough to mistake Snake for Liquid when Snake wears the recovered hairpiece.

rewards.description: Recognizes the Liquid-disguise salute deduction and escort.

title: Mystery 10: Sealed Room
subtitle: Special Mode / Mystery Level 10
objective: Break into the sealed room, inspect the apparent murder scene, and wait for the truth.
briefing: The room is packed with dramatic clues, but there is no suspect to arrest. Let the three-minute investigation timer expire for the ketchup reveal.

rewards.description: Recognizes completion of the sealed-room ketchup reveal.

title: 1 Min. Battle: VS Target / No Weapon
subtitle: Special Mode / 1 Min. Battle / VS Target
objective: Destroy at least 10 KOKESHI-G targets before the 60-second timer expires.
briefing: One minute, one fixed No Weapon loadout. Targets keep cycling through the arena, so maintain momentum and build the highest possible count.

rewards.description: Clears the VS Target No Weapon quota inside one minute.

title: 1 Min. Battle: VS Target / SOCOM
subtitle: Special Mode / 1 Min. Battle / VS Target
objective: Destroy at least 15 CUBE-B targets before the 60-second timer expires.
briefing: One minute, one fixed SOCOM loadout. Targets keep cycling through the arena, so maintain momentum and build the highest possible count.

rewards.description: Clears the VS Target SOCOM quota inside one minute.

title: 1 Min. Battle: VS Target / C4
subtitle: Special Mode / 1 Min. Battle / VS Target
objective: Destroy at least 25 CUBE-R targets before the 60-second timer expires.
briefing: One minute, one fixed C4 loadout. Targets keep cycling through the arena, so maintain momentum and build the highest possible count.

rewards.description: Clears the VS Target C4 quota inside one minute.

subtitle: Special Mode / 1 Min. Battle / VS Target
objective: Destroy at least 25 MOVE-B targets before the 60-second timer expires.
briefing: One minute, one fixed FAMAS loadout. Targets keep cycling through the arena, so maintain momentum and build the highest possible count.

rewards.description: Clears the VS Target FAMAS quota inside one minute.

subtitle: Special Mode / 1 Min. Battle / VS Target

briefing: One minute, one fixed Grenade loadout. Targets keep cycling through the arena, so maintain momentum and build the highest possible count.

rewards.description: Clears the VS Target Grenade quota inside one minute.

subtitle: Special Mode / 1 Min. Battle / VS Target
objective: Destroy at least 18 KOKESHI-B targets before the 60-second timer expires.
briefing: One minute, one fixed Claymore loadout. Targets keep cycling through the arena, so maintain momentum and build the highest possible count.

rewards.description: Clears the VS Target Claymore quota inside one minute.

subtitle: Special Mode / 1 Min. Battle / VS Target
objective: Destroy at least 35 MOVE-R targets before the 60-second timer expires.
briefing: One minute, one fixed Nikita loadout. Targets keep cycling through the arena, so maintain momentum and build the highest possible count.

rewards.description: Clears the VS Target Nikita quota inside one minute.

subtitle: Special Mode / 1 Min. Battle / VS Target
objective: Destroy at least 10 MOVE-B targets before the 60-second timer expires.
briefing: One minute, one fixed PSG1 loadout. Targets keep cycling through the arena, so maintain momentum and build the highest possible count.

rewards.description: Clears the VS Target PSG1 quota inside one minute.

title: 1 Min. Battle: VS Target / Stinger
subtitle: Special Mode / 1 Min. Battle / VS Target
objective: Destroy at least 17 UFO targets before the 60-second timer expires.
briefing: One minute, one fixed Stinger loadout. Targets keep cycling through the arena, so maintain momentum and build the highest possible count.

rewards.description: Clears the VS Target Stinger quota inside one minute.

title: 1 Min. Battle: VS Enemy / No Weapon
subtitle: Special Mode / 1 Min. Battle / VS Enemy
objective: Eliminate at least 4 Genome Soldiers before the 60-second timer expires.
briefing: One minute, one fixed No Weapon loadout. Genome Soldier reinforcements keep entering the arena; reach the clear quota and continue for score.

rewards.description: Clears the VS Enemy No Weapon quota inside one minute.

title: 1 Min. Battle: VS Enemy / SOCOM
subtitle: Special Mode / 1 Min. Battle / VS Enemy
objective: Eliminate at least 15 Genome Soldiers before the 60-second timer expires.
briefing: One minute, one fixed SOCOM loadout. Genome Soldier reinforcements keep entering the arena; reach the clear quota and continue for score.

rewards.description: Clears the VS Enemy SOCOM quota inside one minute.

subtitle: Special Mode / 1 Min. Battle / VS Enemy
objective: Eliminate at least 10 Genome Soldiers before the 60-second timer expires.
briefing: One minute, one fixed C4 loadout. Genome Soldier reinforcements keep entering the arena; reach the clear quota and continue for score.

rewards.description: Clears the VS Enemy C4 quota inside one minute.

subtitle: Special Mode / 1 Min. Battle / VS Enemy
objective: Eliminate at least 18 Genome Soldiers before the 60-second timer expires.
briefing: One minute, one fixed FAMAS loadout. Genome Soldier reinforcements keep entering the arena; reach the clear quota and continue for score.

rewards.description: Clears the VS Enemy FAMAS quota inside one minute.

subtitle: Special Mode / 1 Min. Battle / VS Enemy
objective: Eliminate at least 5 Genome Soldiers before the 60-second timer expires.
briefing: One minute, one fixed Grenade loadout. Genome Soldier reinforcements keep entering the arena; reach the clear quota and continue for score.

rewards.description: Clears the VS Enemy Grenade quota inside one minute.

subtitle: Special Mode / 1 Min. Battle / VS Enemy
objective: Eliminate at least 7 Genome Soldiers before the 60-second timer expires.
briefing: One minute, one fixed Claymore loadout. Genome Soldier reinforcements keep entering the arena; reach the clear quota and continue for score.

rewards.description: Clears the VS Enemy Claymore quota inside one minute.

title: 1 Min. Battle: VS Enemy / Nikita
subtitle: Special Mode / 1 Min. Battle / VS Enemy
objective: Eliminate at least 12 Genome Soldiers before the 60-second timer expires.
briefing: One minute, one fixed Nikita loadout. Genome Soldier reinforcements keep entering the arena; reach the clear quota and continue for score.

rewards.description: Clears the VS Enemy Nikita quota inside one minute.

subtitle: Special Mode / 1 Min. Battle / VS Enemy
objective: Eliminate at least 7 Genome Soldiers before the 60-second timer expires.
briefing: One minute, one fixed PSG1 loadout. Genome Soldier reinforcements keep entering the arena; reach the clear quota and continue for score.

briefing: One minute, one fixed Stinger loadout. Genome Soldier reinforcements keep entering the arena; reach the clear quota and continue for score.

rewards.description: Clears the VS Enemy Stinger quota inside one minute.
